model_specification_line: model = smf.ols(formula='full_time ~ treat * post + age + age_sq + C(year) + C(statefip) + C(sex)', data=df).fit(cov_type='HC1')
sample_selection: yrimmig > 0 and yrimmig <= 2007 (immigrated by 2007, at least 5 years in US by June 2012)
age >= 18 and age <= 40 at survey year
not (empstat == 1 and uhrswork == 0) (drop employed with missing hours)
birthyr >= 1982 (treat=1: under 31 on June 15, 2012) OR birthyr in [1972, 1981] (treat=0: 31-40 on June 15, 2012)
